## Phase 2: Post-Testing Fixes - Complete ✓

Issues discovered during manual testing of Phase 1 in the extension host.

### Todos

#### 9. Formatter Conflict Still Present

**Problem:** Phase 1 removed `DocumentFormattingEditProvider` but kept `DocumentRangeFormattingEditProvider`. VS Code can also show a "multiple formatters" conflict for **range** formatting when another extension (C# Dev Kit / OmniSharp) registers its own range formatter for the same language. When the user does "Format Selection" on C# code, VS Code prompts to choose between formatters.

**Root cause:** `registerReflowProviders()` in `src/reflow/reflowCommands.ts` (line 113) still calls `vscode.languages.registerDocumentRangeFormattingEditProvider()` for every enabled language.

**Functionality preserved:** Removing the range formatting provider does NOT lose any reflow capability. All reflow functionality remains available via:
- `reflowComment` command — reflow current block (command palette / keybinding)
- `reflowAllComments` command — reflow all blocks (command palette / keybinding)
- `ReflowCodeActionProvider` — lightbulb / right-click code actions when cursor is inside a comment block

The only thing lost is the "Format Selection" trigger for reflow, which is the exact trigger causing the conflict.

**Fix:** Remove the range formatting provider entirely:
- Delete `CommentReflowFormattingProvider` class and `registerReflowProviders()` from `reflowCommands.ts`
- Remove the `registerReflowProviders(context)` call from `extension.ts`
- Remove the import

**Files:** `src/reflow/reflowCommands.ts`, `src/extension.ts`

---

#### 10. CodeLens Naming — "Expand Xml" / "Collapse Xml"

**Problem:** CodeLens toggle shows generic `"Expand"` / `"Collapse"` text. Not clear what is being expanded/collapsed.

**Fix:** Rename to `"Expand Xml"` / `"Collapse Xml"` in `commentCodeLensProvider.ts` line 89.

**Files:** `src/rendering/commentCodeLensProvider.ts`

---

#### 11. Remove Comment Hover Provider

**Problem:** `CommentHoverProvider` shows a rich rendered markdown tooltip when hovering over ANY line in a comment block — including the dimmed `/// <summary>` line visible in folded state. With the new CodeLens-driven UX (summary text + click-to-show), this redundant hover on comment body text is unwanted.

**Root cause:** The hover provider (`src/rendering/commentHoverProvider.ts`) has no fold-state awareness. It triggers on all lines between `startLine` and `endLine` regardless of whether the block is collapsed.

**Fix:** Remove the hover provider registration from `extension.ts`:
- Remove `registerHoverProvider(SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES, hoverProvider)` (line ~76)
- Remove `hoverProvider` variable and `CommentHoverProvider` instantiation
- Remove `hoverProvider.setEnabled()` calls in config change handler
- Keep the `LinkAnchorHoverProvider` registration (separate concern — code anchor hovers)
- Keep `commentHoverProvider.ts` file (may be useful later for a different trigger)

**Files:** `src/extension.ts`

---

#### 12. Tooltip Plain-Text Remarks/Example Formatting

**Problem:** `renderTooltipPlainText()` renders Remarks and Example inline on a single line: `Remarks: {text}` and `Example: {text}`. For multi-line content this is unreadable.

**Note:** Even though #15 (Phase 3) removes the CodeLens hover tooltip, `renderTooltipPlainText()` may still be useful for other contexts (e.g., status bar, output channel). Fix the formatting regardless.

**Desired format:** Label on its own line, content indented on subsequent lines:
```
Remarks:
    {remarks content here}

Example:
    {example code here}
```

**Fix:** In `src/rendering/commentRenderer.ts`, update the Remarks section (lines 226-234) and Example section (lines 236-244) to put the label on its own line and indent the content with 4 spaces on subsequent lines.

**Files:** `src/rendering/commentRenderer.ts`

---

#### 13. Opacity Default Too High

**Problem:** Default `dimOpacity` of `0.4` (40%) leaves too much comment text visible when folded. User wants nearly invisible at `0.05` (5%).

**Root cause:** `package.json` sets `default: 0.4` with `minimum: 0.1`. The value `0.05` is below the current minimum.

**Fix:**
- Change `dimOpacity` default from `0.4` to `0.05` in `package.json`
- Lower minimum from `0.1` to `0.01` to allow fine-grained control
- Update `decorationFactory.ts` default parameter from `0.4` to `0.05`
- Update description to reflect new range

**Files:** `package.json`, `src/rendering/decorationFactory.ts`

---

#### 14. Update README.md

**Problem:** README.md documents the pre-Phase 1 behavior (rich hover on comment body, emoji in CodeLens, format-on-save reflow, etc.). Needs updating to reflect Phase 1 and Phase 2 changes.

**Changes to document:**
- CodeLens positioning (`codeLensPosition` setting — inline/ownLine)
- CodeLens naming ("Expand Xml" / "Collapse Xml")
- Click-to-show documentation panel (replaces hover-on-comment)
- Debounced expand/collapse behavior
- Gutter fold sync
- Comment opacity (`dimOpacity` setting, default 0.05)
- Reflow via commands/code actions (not format providers)
- Remove references to `enableReflowOnFormat` setting
- Remove references to hover-on-comment-body for documentation viewing

**Files:** `README.md`

---

### Implementation Order

Most items are independent.

1. **#9** Formatter conflict — remove range formatter (simple deletion)
2. **#10** CodeLens naming — trivial string change
3. **#11** Remove comment hover provider — extension.ts cleanup
4. **#12** Tooltip plain-text formatting — commentRenderer.ts
5. **#13** Opacity default — package.json + decorationFactory.ts
6. **#14** Update README.md — after all changes are complete

### Phase 2: Summary of Changes ✓

All 6 items implemented and tested. Build passes, all 157 unit tests pass.

> *Item #12 (Click-to-Show Rich HTML Panel) moved to [Phase 3](03.xml-rendering-review.03.md) (#15) after rollback.*

#### 9. Formatter Conflict ✓
- Removed `CommentReflowFormattingProvider` class and `registerReflowProviders()` entirely
- No formatting providers registered — eliminates all formatter conflicts
- Reflow remains available via commands (`reflowComment`, `reflowAllComments`) and code actions

#### 10. CodeLens Naming ✓
- Renamed `"Expand"` → `"Expand Xml"`, `"Collapse"` → `"Collapse Xml"`

#### 11. Remove Comment Hover Provider ✓
- Removed `CommentHoverProvider` registration, instantiation, setEnabled calls, and deactivate cleanup
- `LinkAnchorHoverProvider` kept (separate concern)
- `commentHoverProvider.ts` file retained for potential future use

#### 12. Tooltip Remarks/Example Formatting ✓
- Changed from inline `Remarks: {text}` to label on own line with indented content
- Same format applied to Example section

#### 13. Opacity Default ✓
- Default changed from `0.4` to `0.05`
- Minimum lowered from `0.1` to `0.01`
- Updated in both `package.json` and `decorationFactory.ts`

#### 14. README.md Updated ✓
- Rewrote XML Doc Comment Rendering section (CodeLens positioning, documentation panel, no hover)
- Added CodeLens Positioning and Documentation Panel subsections
- Updated Comment Reflow section (removed Format Document/Selection, added Commands section)
- Removed `enableReflowOnFormat` setting reference
- Updated `dimOpacity` default and range
- Added `codeLensPosition` setting
- Added `Reflow All Comments` command

### Files Modified (Phase 2)
- `src/extension.ts` — Removed hover provider, removed range formatter registration
- `src/rendering/commentCodeLensProvider.ts` — Renamed titles, removed tooltip, removed unused import
- `src/rendering/commentRenderer.ts` — Fixed Remarks/Example formatting
- `src/rendering/decorationFactory.ts` — Updated default opacity to 0.05
- `src/reflow/reflowCommands.ts` — Removed `CommentReflowFormattingProvider` and `registerReflowProviders()`
- `package.json` — Updated dimOpacity default/minimum
- `README.md` — Comprehensive update for Phase 1+2 changes
